subject: fix(theme): make ComposeBar glass style theme-reactive
body:
ComposeBar had a module-level glassStyle constant using THEME_HEX.luxury
directly — locked to luxury dark theme and never updated on theme change.
The compose bar background/border would show luxury colors even when
using Retro combo or light mode.

Fix: Convert to getGlassStyle(colors) function called inside the
component with fresh colors from useTheme() on each render.

This was the only remaining theme reactivity bug found in the full
component audit. All other files either call useTheme() for inline
styles or use className-only styling (auto-updated by Uniwind).

Tags: theme, bugfix, reactivity
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 3
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: theme-system
Semver: patch
